name: Blacksmith Tycoon
author: Poki
description: Blacksmith Tycoon is a management game where you build your mining empire from the ground up! Jump aboard the mining train, head to gem-rich zones, and uncover new ore deposits. Use the precious gems you collect to craft powerful weapons and sell them to heroes on epic quests. Invest your hard-earned gold to expand your operations and decorate your shop. Can you forge your way to becoming the ultimate blacksmith tycoon? How to play Blacksmith Tycoon? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Blacksmith Tycoon? Blacksmith Tycoon is created by Panda Pasha Games. Play their other games on Poki: Survival Island ! How can I play Blacksmith Tycoon for free? You can play Blacksmith Tycoon for free on Poki. Can I play Blacksmith Tycoon on mobile devices and desktop? Blacksmith Tycoon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
